defect: parameters outside WPS window (DOC: compare machine settings photo to WPS)
prompt: Compare the field condition against the referenced document, tag, drawing, or standard.
scenario: You are on a manufacturing or assembly floor running standard work with quality gates. The work under review is Production welding, part of the Assembly & Fabrication scope. The observed field condition is: parameters outside WPS window (DOC: compare machine settings photo to WPS). The work is through its testing or inspection step. Reference material on hand: AWS D1.1/D1.3, shop WPS. A drawing, inspection checklist, equipment tag, or manufacturer instruction is available for comparison.
title: Document check: Production welding (production floor)
